name: GLM-4-32B-0414
note: MIT-licensed 32B base pretrained on 15T tokens (incl. reasoning-heavy synthetic data); competitive with GPT-4o/DeepSeek-V3 on IFEval, BFCL-v3 function calling and TAU-Bench agent tasks at a fraction of the size. Separate 128K-context variant also released.
tpsNote: Third-party calculators estimate ~30 tok/s at Q4 on RTX 4090 (extrapolated, not a measured llama.cpp benchmark).
